scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (projects, apps, products, offerings, customers); legacy ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and the full RevenueCat surface (receipts, subscriber attributes/attribution, entitlement grants, purchase/refund/cancel/defer/extend transaction mutations) is out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented purchase receipt recording; Pass B capability expansion
subscription revoke/refund mutation; legacy never implemented writes
legacy connector never implemented subscription deferral; Pass B capability expansion
transaction refund mutation; legacy never implemented writes
subscriber deletion; legacy never implemented writes
legacy connector never implemented attribute updates; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented promotional entitlement grants; Pass B capability expansion
